popularity.description: A minimal Docker image based on Alpine Linux with a complete package index and only 5 MB in size!

hadolint.dockerfile:
FROM scratch
RUN ADD alpine-minirootfs-3.21.6-x86_64.tar.gz / # buildkit
RUN CMD ["/bin/sh"]

issues.title: Create a user for the container
alerts: Last user should not be root

issues.title: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction to the container image
